## Properties

| Property  | Attribute | Description                             | Type                                                                                   | Default     |
| --------- | --------- | --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `dot`     | `dot`     | Show a dot indicator instead of content | `boolean`                                                                              | `false`     |
| `pill`    | `pill`    | Use pill (fully rounded) shape          | `boolean`                                                                              | `true`      |
| `size`    | `size`    | Badge size                              | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm"`                                                                 | `'md'`      |
| `variant` | `variant` | Color variant                           | `"error" \| "info" \| "neutral" \| "primary" \| "secondary" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `'primary'` |
